case_title: DEIFILIA MONTOYA, ET AL VS. ANTONIO SILVA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTOYA, DEIFILIA SILVA, EFRAIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILVA, ANTONIO $14,177.41 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,177.41
COPYING FEES (3 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SILVA, EFRAIN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2008 - CONTINUED TO DEC-18-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, HOWEVER THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CONTINUED FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK P. SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTOYA, DEIFILIA SILVA, EFRAIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILVA, ANTONIO $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $87.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,587.50, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS THE COURT'S DECISION ON THE ISSUE OF REIMBURSMENT FOR MORTGAGE AND UTILITIES COSTS RAISED IN THE CLAIM. THE JUDGMENT DOES NOT ADDRESS OR DECIDE ANY ISSUES PERTAINING TO RENTS RECEIVED, OR COSTS OF MAINTENANE, REPAIR OR IMPROVEMENTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE.
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-28-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-12-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SILVA, ANTONIO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-18-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. RAFAEL FLORES INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTOYA, DEIFILIA SILVA, EFRAIN SERVED NOV-21-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SILVA, EFRAIN SILVA, ANTONIO
